name: Pork Chop and Corn Stuffing Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Golden Corn Soup (4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soup, celery, onion, paprika, and cornbread stuffing in a large bowl.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Spoon the stuffing mixture into the pie plate.
4. Arrange the pork chops over the stuffing mixture and press lightly into the stuffing.
5. In another small bowl, combine the sugar and spicy brown mustard; spread evenly over the pork chops.
6. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes or until the pork chops are fork tender.
